description: A spin off from the penny loafers for men, this pair of moccasin flats from catwalk is designed to charm you out of your staple stilettos. Add a new-season lift to your ensembles with this patent-toed pair. Tap into the mood of the moment - the androgynous - with these flats and work the look with a formal shirt from arrow and tailored pants. Upper Synthetic leather upper with slip-on style features Soft lining and padded sockliner for instep comfort Tie ups above the mouth Reinforced overlay at the heel collar for ankle support Outsole Non-slip TPU outsole with circular lugs on the midfoot and capsule lugs on the forefoot and heel shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
